description: The Waiting Room is the digital space where students and tutors land before a lesson begins. It helps both sides get ready by showing the upcoming session details and giving quick access to key preparation tools. Here, students can upload homework or materials, message their tutor about challenges or topics they want to cover, and test their audio and video setup in advance. It’s designed to make the start of the lesson smooth, focused, and well-prepared for everyone involved.
